visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand outdoors at night in front of a large white industrial building with a prominent Costco sign. The woman on the right wears a white coat and blue beret, holding a membership card. The woman on the left wears a beige cardigan and leans on a shopping cart. Bright artificial lights illuminate the parking lot setting. (2) An insert shot shows a membership verification kiosk inside a lobby. A person in a red jacket scans a card under a red light. The camera focus is on the scanning device and the physical interaction. (3) The video cuts back to the two women outdoors. The woman in the beret holds her card close to the camera, pointing at the barcode with her right hand while speaking. Her facial expressions are lively and engaged. (4) Another brief insert shot shows the digital screen of the scanner, displaying a graphical user interface with a scan prompt circle. (5) Final shot shows the two women again outdoors; the woman in the beret points towards a smartphone she is holding in her other hand, demonstrating an alternative scanning method.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 新制上路 掃臉才能入場. [Subtitle]: 好市多現在進去. (2) [Subtitle]: 都要刷會員卡. [Variety]: 都要刷會員卡. (3) [Subtitle]: 你要用你這個 條碼去感應. (4) [Subtitle]: 或者是手機上的 APP去掃描. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後他的顯示器 就會有你拍照的臉. (6) [Subtitle]: 這樣子你才能 安全進去. (7) [Subtitle]: 所以進去前 大家記得要翻成 條碼對面哦. (8) [Subtitle]: 也可以用APP刷哦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 person scanning a card in the insert shot, and 1 person standing in the background of the same insert shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a beige button-up cardigan with black pants. The other woman wears a white coat over a white top, a navy blue beret, and carries a brown shoulder bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is the exterior of a Costco warehouse store at night with a large blue and red sign. Secondary backgrounds include the indoor entrance area with a membership scanning kiosk and tiled flooring.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks with rapid, energetic prosody in Traditional Chinese. Background music is an upbeat electronic pop track with a synthesized bassline and steady 4/4 rhythm. (2) A sharp, high-frequency digital UI 'beep' sound triggers as the speaker mentions scanning. The BGM maintains its constant tempo and brightness. (3) The vocal delivery continues with high variability in pitch and dynamic intonation. The BGM features shimmering synth pads. (4) A second electronic 'beep' occurs, coinciding with a transition in the narration about the mobile app. (5) The speaker finishes with a rising, friendly intonation while the BGM kicks into a final rhythmic cycle before a hard cut at the end of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform Costco members in Taiwan about a new mandatory membership verification system where cards must be scanned at the entrance, displaying the member's facial photo on a digital screen for security.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides informational content regarding a retail policy change rather than promoting a specific product purchase.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high-energy social media format to disseminate practical store policy information, effectively using on-screen text to reinforce the auditory message.
